HERMIT-BOUNTY.title: Bounty
HERMIT-BOUNTY.description: Normal Enemy: 15 gold. Elite Enemy: 40 gold. Boss: 100 gold.
HERMIT-DEADON.title: Dead On
HERMIT-DEADON.description: Dead On cards have a bonus effect when in the middle of your hand.
HERMIT-DEFEND.title: Defend
HERMIT-STRIKE.title: Strike
HERMIT-CONCENTRATE.title: Concentrate
HERMIT-CONCENTRATE.description: The next [gold]Dead On[/gold] card played this turn triggers its effect regardless of position.
